category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a multi-modal AI tool to extract and summarize content; official homepage describes a CLI and side panel for extraction and summaries.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is summarize; official summarize.sh branding uses lowercase summarize.
docs_sources: Official summarize.sh documentation index covers overview, CLI, extraction, LLMs, config, and related modes.
repo_sources: Official summarize.sh project page links source at github.com/steipete/summarize; official GitHub repository matches the package.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official summarize.sh homepage describes web pages, files, YouTube videos, podcasts, CLI, and browser side panel support.
